What about closing? What are some buying signals? I guess is what I'm when how do you know when to close are there buying signals? Well, I think you're hitting a good point And I think so many times people rush to the clothes. You know, they people want to be romance, right? You know, so you you're a mister romance. I am mister. I'm dressed for romance But you know the buyer wants to be romanced along the way So, you know, so I think we forget that and we need to make that through Some of the buying signals certainly are them saying, you know, will this Turning if they're a partner, you know, will this fit in our living we use the couch So, you know, do you think this would go in front of the fireplace or in front of the the bay window? Well, that's a buying signal if there ever was one You know, I think I like it in blue, you know, do you have it in blue? You know, there's the standard ones that we have It might be them calculating I you know watch people pull out a calculator and figure out the cost or maybe figure out Okay, how does this work and how do we move forward with that? So the verbal and non-verbal and you have to watch both of them Then do you have any thing on buying signals in one to one selling? I think it is about them Starting to shortcut the conversation in one way or another it can be It can be what some people view as an objection that is really raised as a question that essentially if that one is answered Really the right nothing else Matters it can be as he said math Is well, you know, how much is this going to cost? Well, so they've said now They're there right if the answer to that is acceptable then There they are telling you they don't really care about much else They're at that point. Yeah, you know, I don't think it is that I think If not romanced if that isn't always the right language people like to be reassured Right, they they like to feel Like you are showing some respect and appreciation for them as a customer or a client or a patient that you are Professional about this that you are not, you know, just Walking around with a club behind your back eager to hit somebody over the head the minute they slow down and Take their wallet, you know that there's right something more to this right So I know the folks who are watching this want though they want some closing Language, I know I know that they do all right all we talked about all the cool stuff that but they want some closing language I'm sure I'm sure we're getting questions about closing language.
